meaning: n.将就,凑合,权宜之计adj.权宜之计的,凑合的
examples: A few cushions formed a makeshift bed.
People are sprawled on makeshift beds in the cafeteria.
Not far from them, other survivors in the earthquake wail in pain at the makeshift hospital.
Starting 9 September, makeshift sidewalk studios crafting beautiful clay idols will spring up along nearly every city street.
They only felt safe in so far as they could defend themselves with their makeshift weapons.
